Who We Are

Redefining Scouting Efficiency

SPM Scouting is a sports technology consultancy specialized in helping semi-professional and professional football clubs sign the right players — using Big Data and AI to reduce the margin of error.

🎯

Mission

To contribute to the development of less advanced football markets and continue to strengthen the most dominant ones by improving the efficiency of transfers with data.

🔭

Vision

To create innovative technology that is accessible to any club and adapts to the needs of each team.

100K+ Footballers indexed
The Problem We Solve

Blending Experience with Technology

⚠️ Challenges

  • Limited coverage Resource constraints limit football market coverage and reduce opportunities to identify key talent.
  • Low efficiency Attending numerous matches and investing extensive hours.
  • High investment costs Incurred both in acquiring the necessary technology and in employing the technical staff to operate it.
→

✅ Our Solution

  • Mix Big Data, AI & Club Scouting Our algorithms are integrated with sports management to optimize transfers and minimize errors.
  • Reduction in scouting costs and time Algorithms that instantly filter the best player for each club request.
  • Access to a wider market We access strategic markets that are inaccessible to our clients due to the high costs involved.
What We Offer

Two Paths to More Efficient Signings

We partner with the club throughout the season, integrating ourselves into its scouting team.

We shape the future of football, building it with you.

01
Most In Demand
On Request

SPM
On Demand

Quick and accurate search for players according to the club's specific needs. Recommendation of footballers upon request.

  • Instant player search filtered by AI
  • Fast turnaround on every request
  • Access to 100K+ footballers worldwide
  • Contextual performance profiles
Request a search →
02
Full Season

SPM
360 Strategy

Comprehensive long-term strategic plan with comparative squad and league analysis, identification of needs, prioritisation of signings and departures, and proactive recommendations.

  • Full squad & league comparative analysis
  • Signing and departure prioritisation
  • Proactive talent recommendations
  • Embedded in your scouting team
Start your strategy →
